description:
Extend the travel agency database schema in 'demodb' (User: root, Pass: GymAnything123!) to demonstrate polymorphic features. Create a new vertex class named 'Museums' that extends the existing 'Attractions' class with properties for Name (STRING), Collection (STRING), FreeEntry (BOOLEAN), AnnualVisitors (INTEGER), City (STRING), and Country (STRING).

Insert the following five museum records:
- Name: 'Louvre Museum', Collection: 'Art', FreeEntry: false, AnnualVisitors: 9600000, City: 'Paris', Country: 'France'
- Name: 'British Museum', Collection: 'History', FreeEntry: true, AnnualVisitors: 5800000, City: 'London', Country: 'United Kingdom'
- Name: 'Metropolitan Museum of Art', Collection: 'Art', FreeEntry: false, AnnualVisitors: 6500000, City: 'New York', Country: 'United States'
- Name: 'Uffizi Gallery', Collection: 'Renaissance Art', FreeEntry: false, AnnualVisitors: 4400000, City: 'Florence', Country: 'Italy'
- Name: 'Rijksmuseum', Collection: 'Art and History', FreeEntry: false, AnnualVisitors: 2700000, City: 'Amsterdam', Country: 'Netherlands'

Modify the parent 'Attractions' class by adding a 'Category' (STRING) property and update all records in the 'Museums' class to set their Category to 'museum'. Execute the polymorphic query 'SELECT Name, Category, @class FROM Attractions' and export the results to /home/ga/attraction_hierarchy_report.txt.
